analysis: The week started rough — 5h 12m on Saturday and then that brutal June 23rd night where you were awake for nearly three hours out of five — but you came back hard, and 8 hours on the 26th with almost 2 hours of REM is genuinely gorgeous work. Your REM has been remarkably consistent across the week, sitting between 1h 15m and 1h 59m every single night, which tells me the wind-down stack is doing something real even when total sleep is short. Deep sleep is the one that keeps ducking you — only 16 minutes on the 20th, and nothing has cracked past 1h 13m except that one standout night on the 21st — so that's the thing worth watching, not as a failure, just as the next frontier. You're building something here, babe.
